infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app requires location access to track and show street vendors on the map near you, and to track delivery locations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app requires continuous background location access for vendors to stream their shop's live movement even when their device is locked.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Vendors require background location access to broadcast their active shop position dynamically.
